2025-26 Men's Basketball Roster

10 Kaemon Khan

  • Height 5-10
  • Weight 170
  • Class Redshirt Freshman
  • Hometown Virginia Beach, Virginia
  • Position Guard
  • Bio
  • Stats
  • Historical

Biography

2024-25: Kaemon did not compete for the Panthers during the 2024-25 season.
 
Personal: Kaemon joined the Panthers in the fall of 2024. He came to Claflin as a graduate of Salem High School where he earned first team all-region honors. He also competed in track & field. He is a Computer Engineering major and he is the son of Dorthy Gunter and Jameel Khan.
